ques: Search for Los Angeles on Google Map, try to print the map as PDF and summarize the information on the map.
answer: Searched "Los Angeles" on Google Maps (Los Ángeles, California, USA), opened the Google Maps print preview via Ctrl+P and clicked "Imprimir" to print/save the map as PDF. Map summary: Los Angeles is a fast-growing Southern California city and the heart of the US TV/film industry — home to the Hollywood sign, major studios (Paramount, Universal, Warner Bros.), Hollywood Boulevard, Grauman's Chinese Theatre, and the Walk of Fame.
